news.title: Big Tech's big AI spending is 'a good thing' right now
news.summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) led US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC) to daily gains on Tuesday as chip stocks began to show signs of recovering from last week's sell-off. Investors' eyes are especially wide on Big Tech earnings expected out this week. Prime Capital Financial CIO Will McGough sits down with Josh Lipton to comment on what tech investors will want to see in Alphabet's (GOOG, GOOGL) earnings and the rest of the Magnificent Seven performances.

news.title: Stocks rise despite climbing oil prices
news.summary: Stock markets rose Tuesday as technology shares rebounded further, while oil prices climbed as Iran targeted US radar and air defense installations in the Gulf.But the higher oil prices didn't weigh on equities trading as it often does, with investors piling back into tech stocks.

news.title: How major US stock indexes fared Tuesday 7/21/2026
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.7%, and the Nasdaq composite climbed 1.3%.  Micron Technology and Nvidia were the two strongest forces lifting the market as AI stocks climbed for a second straight day after tumbling the week before.  The Nasdaq composite rose 329.13 points, or 1.3%, to 25,837.21.

news.title: Coinbase (COIN) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
news.summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 11% in the morning session after reports that the White House and Senate Republicans reached an agreement on an ethics package for the CLARITY Act, which could clear a major hurdle for the digital asset regulation bill. The broader crypto market also showed strength, with Bitcoin reaching a two-week high. news.title: Beyond GLD: The 0.40% Fee Drag That Is Slowly Bleeding Your Gold Returns
news.summary: GLD has tracked gold faithfully for two decades, but a quiet cost buried in its expense ratio has been siphoning returns from long-term holders who never realized a cheaper alternative from the same issuer even existed.
